scenarios.name: aristocrats
scenarios.notes: Golgari sacrifice and graveyard fixture. Expectations are tolerant so tests catch lost Meren support, broken roles, or missing package/explanation data without freezing an exact decklist.

scenarios.name: landfall
scenarios.notes: Green landfall/ramp fixture using the local sample catalog. Commander expectation allows the broader catalog-supported candidates while deck generation exercises landfall package cards.

scenarios.name: spellslinger
scenarios.notes: Catalog-constrained noncreature/control fixture. It verifies multicolor commander ranking and spell-heavy role quality without claiming a complete production spellslinger card pool.
